title: Box-model primitive slot pool
description: Closed set of slot names that every component contract inherits as a stable, themable surface for padding, gap, and intrinsic sizing. Each slot resolves the same way as a component token (var(--<resolvesTo>, <fallback>) or a CSS literal). New slots may only be added by extending this schema; component sidecars may override any slot's resolution but cannot introduce new slot names.

boxModelResolution.description: Resolution for one box-model slot. Either token-backed (resolvesTo + fallback) or a constrained CSS literal. Literals are restricted to the value-shape vocabulary that box-model properties accept (lengths, percentages, viewport units, the keywords 0/auto/none/min-content/max-content/fit-content, and var() references). Free-form strings are rejected at schema time to keep the slot pool compilable across themes.

oneOf.description: Token reference — resolves via the global token graph as var(--<resolvesTo>, <fallback>).
Literal CSS value — must match the constrained box-model value vocabulary.

resolvesTo.description: Dotted path into the global token graph (e.g. "core.spacing.size.04"), without the -- prefix.

fallback.description: Hardcoded fallback — the second argument passed to var() in the emitted slot declaration. Must match the box-model literal vocabulary.

literal.description: Hardcoded CSS value, mutually exclusive with `resolvesTo`+`fallback`. Constrained to the box-model literal vocabulary.

layer.description: Expected resolution layer for resolvesTo. Defaults to "core" — box-model slots typically resolve into the spacing/dimension scales.
